title: Nexus Guardian | Advanced Edge AI Vision Ecosystem

sections.heading:
Smart AI Vision &
Precision Targeting
sections.content: A powerful, easy-to-use dashboard to connect AI vision models with your physical hardware. Track targets in real-time, calculate depth accurately, and control servos with zero delay.

items.title: Real-time Inference
items.desc: Optimize YOLO11x-Pose models with TensorRT to achieve 30+ FPS on edge devices with minimal thermal footprint.

items.title: Sub-pixel Precision
items.desc: Advanced homography mapping translates digital coordinates to physical servo movements with micro-degree accuracy.

items.title: Kalman Smoothing
items.desc: Integrated GhostPredictor™ technology eliminates hardware jitter and predicts object trajectories in real-time.

items.title: Stereo Triangulation
items.desc: Military-grade depth estimation using dual epipolar-aligned feeds for accurate spatial positioning.

items.title: Hardware Bridge
items.desc: Direct-to-metal serial dispatch at 66Hz, ensuring zero-latency control for ESP32 and industrial microcontrollers.

items.title: Audited Security
items.desc: Transparent, open-source architecture with fully audited communication protocols for secure field deployment.

block.title: Unrivaled Stereo Calibration
block.desc: Seamlessly integrate Python-based matrices with MATLAB engines. Our pipeline crushes epipolar errors and locks intrinsic parameters with enterprise-grade stability.

blocks.title: Live Pose Telemetry
blocks.desc: Visualize real-time AI confidence streams and skeletal extraction directly from the live hardware feed.

blocks.title: Dynamic Laser Mapping
blocks.desc: Map coordinate systems on the fly. Click, steer, and compile homography matrices instantly through our intuitive spatial interface.

topBlock.title: Transparent Serial Architecture
topBlock.desc: Monitor every heartbeat. Our hardware console provides full visibility into ESP32 communication, payload integrity, and real-time servo feedback loops.

bottomBlocks.title: Tactical Control
bottomBlocks.desc: Manual override for pan/tilt servos and precision laser GPIO toggles.

bottomBlocks.title: Edge Configuration
bottomBlocks.desc: Hot-swappable AI weights and dynamic filtering thresholds for any environment.
